name: White Gull Inn Apple Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream butter and sugar until well combined.
3. Add eggs and sour cream; mix well.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture, along with vanilla, and beat well.
6. Spread half of the batter into a 10 x 14 inch buttered baking pan.
7. Combine apples and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
8. Spoon the apple-cinnamon mixture over the batter in the pan.
9. Spread remaining batter over the apples.
10. Sprinkle topping mixture evenly over the batter.
11. Bake for one hour or until golden brown.
Note: The topping ingredients should be combined separately before sprinkling over the batter.
